content: Canonical schema: tenants, sessions, skills, rate-limits, cost-tracking, audit. All use TENANT#{id} as PK. See ClawCore-Final-Architecture-Plan.md

title: Project codename: AWS Chimera
rationale: Multi-formed Greek creature reflects multi-tenant, multi-agent, multi-platform, self-evolving nature. AWS internal codename style (Bedrock, Mantle, Kuiper). CLI: chimera deploy/agent/skill.

content: AgentCore MicroVMs are ephemeral — no EFS mount support. For POSIX workspace needs, use Fargate sidecar MCP tools with EFS mounted. Pattern: AgentCore for compute, Fargate sidecars for stateful services. S3 is the primary durable storage for agent workspaces.

title: 6-table DDB schema for multi-tenant SaaS
rationale: Per-tenant IAM isolation via LeadingKeys works better with separate tables, independent scaling/TTL/encryption per table, clearer separation of concerns. Enhanced tenant config uses multi-item pattern.

title: 8-stack CDK architecture
rationale: Separation of concerns, independent deployment, team ownership, blast radius control, compliance boundaries. Current 3/8 is Phase 0.

name: GSI cross-tenant leakage prevention
description: GSI queries on shared DynamoDB tables can leak cross-tenant data. Always add FilterExpression with tenantId on GSI queries for skills and audit tables. IAM LeadingKeys condition only protects PK-based queries, not GSI scans.
